name: Hacker News Reader
description: Browse and search Hacker News — top stories, new posts, and full-text search via Algolia.
long_description: Access Hacker News directly from Thoth. Browse the front page, discover new posts, search the full HN archive via Algolia, and read story details with top comments — all without leaving your conversation. Zero configuration, no API key needed.

tools.name: hacker_news
tools.description: Browse and search Hacker News stories, comments, and discussions

skills.name: hacker_news_reader
skills.description: Guides the agent on when and how to use the Hacker News tool

default_count.label: Default number of stories
default_count.description: How many stories to fetch per request (1-30)
